settings.title: You send the brief
settings.body: Budget, use case, aesthetic — whatever you want me to know. Form below, no commitment.

settings.title: I send a parts list
settings.body: Within 48 hours. Itemized parts, total cost, build timeline. Approve, revise, or walk away.

settings.title: I build & test
settings.body: Hand-assembled, cabled, and burn-in tested 24h with full benchmark data sent to you.

settings.title: Custom-foam crated
settings.body: Insured shipping, signed delivery. 12-month warranty starts the day it arrives.

settings.title: Workhorse
settings.description: Solid 1440p gaming or general productivity. Mid-range CPU + GPU, quiet cooling, room to grow.

settings.title: Apex
settings.description: High-refresh 4K, streaming, light content work. The build most people end up with.

settings.title: Studio
settings.description: Render workstations, scientific compute, watercooled showpieces. Built around your brief.
